incident.title: Checkout API latency and timeout spike
incident.description: Elevated checkout latency and downstream timeout errors during peak reporting activity.
incident.customer_impact: Some checkout attempts returned errors or took longer than 10 seconds.

evidence.raw_content:
# Database latency runbook

## Triage
Check p95 query latency, connection pool saturation, wait events, and top query fingerprints for the incident window.

## Safe diagnostics
Prefer read-only database views and application metrics. Do not kill sessions until the incident commander approves.

## Reporting workload mitigation
If reports-worker is saturating the database, pause new report generation or lower concurrency. Validate that db_query_latency_ms and checkout-api p95 latency recover before declaring mitigation successful.
